requirements.requirementText: IPO prospectus must include audited financial statements for 2 years (balance sheet) and 2 years (income statement/cash flow) certified under Sarbanes-Oxley Section 302
requirements.guidanceText: Auditor must be registered with PCAOB. Audit must follow PCAOB standards. Management must assess internal controls over financial reporting (ICFR).

requirements.requirementText: Management must assess effectiveness of internal control over financial reporting (ICFR) per SOX Section 302
requirements.guidanceText: Includes document and test ICFR, issue management assessment report. Auditor must also assess ICFR effectiveness.

requirements.requirementText: Issuer must establish Audit Committee with at least one 'audit committee financial expert' per SOX Section 407
requirements.guidanceText: Financial expert must have professional accounting background and current financial reporting experience. If no expert available, must disclose and explain.

requirements.requirementText: IPO prospectus must be filed as Form S-1 or equivalent (F-1 for foreign issuers)
requirements.guidanceText: Form S-1 is comprehensive registration statement for IPOs. Must include all required disclosure items. Foreign issuers may use F-1 form.

requirements.requirementText: Disclose compensation for CEO, CFO, and 3 most highly compensated executive officers per Item 402(a)
requirements.guidanceText: Include named executive officers' base salary, bonus, equity awards, change-of-control benefits, and pension benefits. Include Compensation Discussion & Analysis (CD&A).

requirements.requirementText: Provide detailed Management Discussion & Analysis (MD&A) covering 2 fiscal years and any subsequent interim period
requirements.guidanceText: MD&A must discuss liquidity, capital resources, results of operations, and trends. Must be plain English and focused on material items.

validationRules.errorMessageTemplate: EDGAR requires PDF, HTML, or XML format. Got {format}
validationRules.remediationGuidance: Convert document to PDF or HTML format acceptable to SEC EDGAR system

validationRules.errorMessageTemplate: File size {actual} bytes exceeds SEC EDGAR limit of {max} bytes
validationRules.remediationGuidance: Reduce file size or split into multiple documents for EDGAR submission
Add all required risk factor subsections per SEC Item 503

ruleConfig.patternDescription: Paragraphs should be under 500 words, sentences under 75 words

validationRules.errorMessageTemplate: Document may not comply with SEC plain English requirements
validationRules.remediationGuidance: Simplify language, break long paragraphs into shorter ones, use active voice

checklists.checklistName: SEC EDGAR IPO Filing Checklist (Form S-1)

items.text: Form S-1 Cover Page with CIK assignment
items.guidance: Must be signed by authorized officers. Include CIK number from prior EDGAR registrations or SEC assignment letter.

items.text: Audited Balance Sheets (2 years) - Form 10-K compliant
items.guidance: Auditor must be PCAOB-registered. Must include comparative balance sheets and notes.
Include comparative income statements and notes to financial statements.

items.text: Audited Statements of Cash Flows (2 years)
items.guidance: Show operating, investing, and financing activities.
Must be dated and from PCAOB-registered auditor. Audit opinion required.
Required certifications by CEO and CFO. Must follow exact SOX language.
Management's assessment of internal control over financial reporting effectiveness.
Auditor's report on management's assessment of ICFR. Attestation audit required for large accelerated filers.
Comprehensive MD&A covering 2 fiscal years plus interim period if applicable.
Detailed risk factors covering all material risks to the business and investment.
Detailed compensation disclosure for Named Executive Officers including change-of-control provisions.
Disclosure of all material related party transactions.
Opinion from counsel re: valid organization, authority to issue securities, capitalization.
Lead underwriter letter confirming engagement and commitment to underwriting.
Audit Committee must include at least one financial expert.

checklists.description: Complete checklist for SEC EDGAR IPO filing via Form S-1

documentRequirements.description: Audited Financial Statements (Balance Sheet, Income Statement, Cash Flow)

riskFactorRequirements.description: Risks relating to competition in the issuer's industry
Risks relating to liquidity, capital resources, and financial condition

auditorRequirements.requirementDescription: Auditor must be registered with the Public Company Accounting Oversight Board (PCAOB)

guidanceTemplates.guidanceText: Risk factors are most effective when they are specific to an issuer rather than generic boilerplate. Each risk factor should address a substantial concern that could impact the investment decision.
guidanceTemplates.weakExample: We face competition. The industry is competitive and other companies compete with us.
guidanceTemplates.weakExampleExplanation: Completely generic and boilerplate. Provides no specific information about actual competitive threats.
guidanceTemplates.strongExample: Our business model depends on maintaining gross margins above 40% through premium product positioning. We compete directly with three larger competitors who have 50% combined market share. If these competitors reduce pricing by 15%, our gross margins could drop to 32%, materially reducing profitability and our ability to fund R&D investments.
guidanceTemplates.strongExampleExplanation: Specific about competitive landscape, quantifies the threat, and explains financial impact.
tips: Avoid boilerplate - focus on issuer-specific risks
Rank risks by materiality and likelihood
Update based on current market conditions
